scenarios.signal: Competing infrastructure financing offers from China, India, and Japan are creating parallel dependency tracks.
scenarios.context: Hambantota Port's 99-year lease to CMPORT remains the defining case study for debt-for-equity risk calculus in South Asia.
scenarios.implication: Each new bilateral project creates sovereign commitment that constrains future strategic optionality. Multi-vector balancing requires active management.
scenarios.action: Map bilateral project commitments by sector and counterparty. Model contingent liability exposure under stress scenarios.

meta.methodology: Monte Carlo sampling + linear trend extrapolation
meta.disclaimer: Pre-computed at build time. Not financial or investment advice.
